# Wander Cargo Service Ltd.

> An FMC-licensed international NVOCC (Non-Vessel Operating Common Carrier) providing ocean freight, logistics and supply-chain solutions from China to 80+ countries across Asia, Africa, Europe and the Middle East. ISO 9001, FIATA, WCA and IATA certified. 10+ years in business, 10,000+ TEU handled a year, 150+ global agents, 95% customer retention.

## Company
- Legal name: Wander Cargo Service Ltd. (Yiwu Wander Cargo Service Limited)
- Type: FMC-Licensed NVOCC & freight forwarder
- CEO / Managing Director: Md. Aminul Alam
- Head office: Room 1F020-27, Jinfu Yuan, 680 Chouzhou North Road, Yiwu Int'l Trade City, Jinhua, Zhejiang, China 322000
- Mobile / WhatsApp: +86 153 5698 5576
- Landline: +86 579 8555 0044
- Email: ceo@wandercargo.com, info@wandercargo.com
- Website: www.wandercargo.com

## Certifications
- FMC-Licensed NVOCC
- ISO 9001
- FIATA Membership
- WCA (WCAworld) Membership
- IATA Certification
- Customs Brokerage Licenses

## Services
- Ocean Freight (NVOCC): FCL, LCL, buyer consolidation, multi-country consolidation, door-to-door
- Freight Forwarding: import & export logistics, customs coordination, cargo insurance, documentation
- Specialized Cargo: dangerous goods (DG), project cargo, heavy lift, breakbulk, temperature-controlled
- Supply Chain: warehousing, distribution, cross-docking, inventory management

## Carrier partnerships
MSC, Maersk, CMA CGM, COSCO, Hapag-Lloyd

## Trade lanes
China to: Middle East, Africa, Europe, Southeast Asia, South Asia (Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Pakistan), India
Key ports: Shanghai, Ningbo, Shenzhen, Singapore, Casablanca, Chittagong, Mongla, Dhaka, Southampton, Madrid, Barcelona

## Industry expertise
Chemicals, petrochemicals, sulphur, fertilizers, food commodities, steel, textiles, FMCG, pharmaceuticals, electronics

## Breakbulk specialty
Kazakhstan sulphur exports, Central Asia chemicals, fertilizers and petrochemicals, bulk commodity logistics, project cargo
